/usr/bin/cc -fno-stack-clash-protection -Wall -Wextra -Wformat -Wformat-security  -fstack-protector-strong -mno-avx -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -z noexecstack -z relro -z now CMakeFiles/SvtAv1EncApp.dir/app_config.c.o CMakeFiles/SvtAv1EncApp.dir/app_context.c.o CMakeFiles/SvtAv1EncApp.dir/app_input_y4m.c.o CMakeFiles/SvtAv1EncApp.dir/app_main.c.o CMakeFiles/SvtAv1EncApp.dir/app_output_ivf.c.o CMakeFiles/SvtAv1EncApp.dir/app_process_cmd.c.o CMakeFiles/SvtAv1EncApp.dir/svt_time.c.o ../../CMakeFiles/safestringlib.dir/third_party/safestringlib/safe_str_constraint.c.o ../../CMakeFiles/safestringlib.dir/third_party/safestringlib/ignore_handler_s.c.o ../../CMakeFiles/safestringlib.dir/third_party/safestringlib/strnlen_s.c.o ../../CMakeFiles/safestringlib.dir/third_party/safestringlib/strncpy_s.c.o ../../CMakeFiles/safestringlib.dir/third_party/safestringlib/strcpy_s.c.o -o /home/lilith/research/svtav1/Bin/Release/SvtAv1EncApp  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lilith/research/svtav1/Bin/Release: /home/lilith/research/svtav1/Bin/Release/libSvtAv1Enc.so.4.0.1 -lm
